acceptance_targets: [ch13_f05] PASS if the revised target spans preserve meaning while reducing this construction to at most two uses across the chapter and each replacement states what is present (not only what it is not); FAIL otherwise.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised target spans preserve meaning while reducing this construction to at most two uses across the chapter and each replacement states what is present (not only what it is not); FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: A recurring negation-contrast sentence formula (not X/just Y; not X/not Y) appears more than twice and reads as a prose tic rather than intentional variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary sentence architecture in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:259-271, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:327, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:389-390 by replacing negation scaffolds with positive, scene-specific images/actions.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted beat contains at least one concrete observable cue replacing abstract motive labeling and no sentence in those spans directly names a motive pair without adjacent behavioral evidence; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: Interpretive summary lines pre-explain motives ('old script,' 'honest and controlling') where the scene already supplies behavior, reducing ambiguity and reader inference.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite interpretive sentences at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:81-82, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:231-232, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:457-458 into observable micro-actions, sensory cues, or contradictory behavior that lets meaning emerge indirectly.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each revised target beat uses no more than one explicit counting/ledger action and introduces at least one non-numeric stress response (gesture, avoidance, sensory fixation, speech disruption); FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: Mechanical reuse of style-bible stress signatures (counting, ledger logic, logistical inventory, debt math) begins to read as checklist execution and flattens spontaneity.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:145-146, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:199-204, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_13.md:461-465, keep only one explicit numeric/logistical stress tell per beat and replace the others with fresh behavior specific to this rupture scene.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
